'''R5-F7''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] serving onboard [[Gold Four/Legends|Gold Four]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lepira/Legends|Lepira's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]], flying point for [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] during the assault on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and fending off [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] to clear a path for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to reach the Death Star's vulnerable [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|exhaust port]]. R5-F7 was destroyed during the battle along with Lepira when their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was shot down.<ref name="TAC" />

==Behind the scenes==
This astromech was first identified when it was released as a [[Hasbro]] action figure as part of a [[2007]] [[Toys "R" Us]] exclusive. It was packaged with a BTL Y-wing starfighter that also included Lepira.<ref name="TAC" />

R5-F7 was made as a [[LEGO]]® minifigure in [[2012]]. However, he was mistakenly positioned as [[Jon Vander/Legends|Dutch Vander's]] astromech.<ref name="LEGOyw">{{LEGOCite|num=9495|name=Gold Leader's Y-wing Starfighter}}</ref> The minifigure also appeared in the [[2013]] LEGO® Advent calendar under day number one.<ref name="LEGOac">{{LEGOCite|num=75023|name=Star Wars Advent Calendar}}</ref>
